description: Pinned ML Kit on-device translation language list (59 languages). Source: https://developers.google.com/ml-kit/language/translation/translation-language-support (fetched 2026-07-04). These are the exact BCP-47 codes modules/translator listSupportedLanguages() returns on Android. Note the legacy codes ML Kit kept: 'he' (not iw), 'id' (not in), 'no' (not nb), 'tl' (not fil).
